about-intro: Software Engineering graduate with over 8 years of experience in mobile and web development. Proactive and self-taught professional, specializing in Android development, backend systems, and web technologies. Worked on high-impact projects with focus on code refactoring, module maintenance, microservices, and biometric validations.
about-tagline: Builds high-performance Android apps and real-time systems that are fast, responsive, and secure.
